Part.Source:
&MovCodMovItmCod.Clear()
For Each Order EmpCod, CtabanCod, LanBanData where EmpCod = &EmpCod where CtabanCod = &CtaBanCod where LanBanStatus.IsEmpty() or LanBanStatus = StatusConciliacao.pendente where LanBanStatus <> StatusConciliacao.Ignorar Where LanBanVlr = &LanBanVlr when not &LanBanVlr.IsEmpty() Where LanBanDoc like &localizar or LanBanDesc like &localizar when not &localizar.IsEmpty() where LanBanData.Month() = &dataMes when not &dataAno.IsEmpty() where LanBanData.year() = &dataAno when not &dataAno.IsEmpty() where LanBanData.day() = &dataDia when not &dataDia.IsEmpty()
&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem = new() &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.CtabanCodOrigem = CtabanCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.CtaBanCodOrigemNome = CtaBanCodNom &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanCod = LanBanCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanCreDeb = LanBanCreDeb &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanStatus = LanBanStatus &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanVlr = LanBanVlr &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanData = LanBanData &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanDesc = LanBanDesc &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.LanBanDoc = LanBanDoc
&FimMovDtaCon = LanBanData &iniMovDtaCon = LanBanData Do CAse CAse LanBanData.DayOfWeek() = 7 &FimMovDtaCon = &FimMovDtaCon.AddDays(2) CAse LanBanData.DayOfWeek() = 1 &FimMovDtaCon = &FimMovDtaCon.AddDays(1) EndCase
For Each Order EmpCod, MovDtaCon, MovCod, MovItmCod where MovItmVlr = LanBanVlr //mesmo valor where MovDtaCon >= &iniMovDtaCon and MovDtaCon <= &FimMovDtaCon where (MovSts = Status_Caixa.Lancado or MovSts.IsEmpty() or MovSts.IsNull()) where (MovItmSts = Status_Caixa.Lancado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull()) where MovCreDeb = LanBanCreDeb where (MovItmIsCon = Status_SimNao.Nao or MovItmIsCon.IsEmpty() or MovItmIsCon.IsNull()) where MovCtaBanCod = CtabanCod
&Varchar = trim(str(MovCod)) + '.' + trim(str(MovItmCod)) if &Varchar in &MovCodMovItmCod Else &MovCodMovItmCod.Add(&Varchar)
&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento = new() &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCod = MovCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDta = MovDta &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDtaCon = MovDtaCon &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovTip = MovTip &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCtaBanCod = MovCtaBanCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovVlr = MovItmVlr &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDoc = MovDoc &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCreDeb = MovCreDeb &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovItmCod = MovItmCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovItmlCpl = MovItmCpl &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom
&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.Movimento.Add(&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento) Exit Endif when none if &IsConciliarAproximada = true
&FimMovDtaCon = LanBanData.AddDays(5) &iniMovDtaCon = LanBanData.AddDays(-5)
For Each Order EmpCod, MovDtaCon, MovCod, MovItmCod where MovItmVlr = LanBanVlr //mesmo valor where MovDtaCon >= &iniMovDtaCon and MovDtaCon <= &FimMovDtaCon where (MovSts = Status_Caixa.Lancado or MovSts.IsEmpty() or MovSts.IsNull()) where (MovItmSts = Status_Caixa.Lancado or MovItmSts.IsEmpty() or MovItmSts.IsNull()) where MovCreDeb = LanBanCreDeb where (MovItmIsCon = Status_SimNao.Nao or MovItmIsCon.IsEmpty() or MovItmIsCon.IsNull()) where MovCtaBanCod = CtabanCod
&Varchar = trim(str(MovCod)) + '.' + trim(str(MovItmCod)) if &Varchar in &MovCodMovItmCod Else &MovCodMovItmCod.Add(&Varchar)
&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento = new() &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCod = MovCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDta = MovDta &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDtaCon = MovDtaCon &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovTip = MovTip &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCtaBanCod = MovCtaBanCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovVlr = MovItmVlr &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovDoc = MovDoc &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovCreDeb = MovCreDeb &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovItmCod = MovItmCod &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.MovItmlCpl = MovItmCpl &SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento.PlanCodNom = PlanCodNom
&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem.Movimento.Add(&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItemMovimento) Exit Endif When none &QtdErros += 1 EndFor Else &QtdErros += 1 Endif EndFor
&SdtConciliacaoBancaria.Add(&SdtConciliacaoBancariaItem)
if &QtdErros = &qtdItensConciliacao or &SdtConciliacaoBancaria.Count = 50 //se der a qtd de erros ou 50 registros por vez exit Endif
EndFor

parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&CtaBanCod, in:&dataDia, in:&dataMes, in:&dataAno, in:&qtdItensConciliacao, in:&localizar, in:&IsConciliarDataValor, in:&IsConciliarAproximada, in:&LanBanVlr, out:&SdtConciliacaoBancaria);
